Motion To Consolidate Actions Of Case (Cgc-13-276169) With Case (Cgc-12-276040)
Off Calendar Feb-05-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jason M. Rose of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / moving parties James Rodrigues, et al. in actions #276040 and #276169
(Refer to Sign-in Sheet for other appearances.)

RULING:
PLAINTIFFS' MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE (CGC-13-276169) WITH CASE (CGC-12-276040)

No objection made and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's motion for order to consolidate actions for all purposes including trial is granted. Actions nos. 276040 and 276169 are consolidated for all purposes. Henceforth all papers shall be filed in the lead case no. 276040. No opposition filed. One order for both cases signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported (503/TLJ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Substitute Successor For Deceased Plaintiff
Off Calendar Dec-04-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Michael D. Levinson of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for petitioner
/ moving party James Rodriguez

RULING:
PLAINTIFF'S AND PETITIONER'S MOTION TO SUBSTITUTE JAMES RODRIGUEZ AS SUCCESSOR-IN-INTEREST FOR DECEASED PLAINTIFF RAYMOND ANCHANDO

No appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's and Petitioner's motion to substitute James Rodriguez as successor-in-interest for deceased plaintiff Raymond Anchando is granted. James Rodriguez is substituted as successor-in-interest and may amend the caption of the complaint showing such substitution. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported (503/TLJ)
